rows.notes: Clear header text. No amounts. Identifies the section as 'Receipts of the Penultimate Year'.
Clear handwriting. Right-aligned shillings visible. No pounds column entry. Valid range (s=8).
Clear entry. Shillings column shows 6. No pounds or pence visible.
Handwriting is small. Shillings read as 11, pence as 9. Both within valid range. Slight ink wear but readable.
Legible shillings value of 2. Single digit in shillings column, clear position.
Shillings column shows 20 — unusual as 20 shillings = 1 pound. May be a data entry error in source or represents sum before conversion. Reading appears correct from column alignment.
Clear single digit (4) in shillings column. Valid range.
Shillings reads 7, pence reads 5. Handwriting is consistent with surrounding entries. Both within valid range.
Clear single digit (3) for shillings. Valid reading.

rows.description: Between for Ditto: Cant. 22 Ent. Cant.
rows.notes: Pence value reads as 19 — exceeds valid maximum of 11. This indicates a misreading of column boundaries or data entry error. Text is partially obscured. Shillings=5 is plausible but pence=19 violates currency rules.
Shillings=4 is clear. Pence digit appears to be 11, with a trailing '3q' symbol indicating three farthings (0.75). Pence=11 is at the maximum valid value; the fraction symbol indicates partial pence.
Pence column shows 16 — exceeds maximum of 11. Indicates column misalignment or smeared ink. Shillings appears to be 0. This row likely has a reading error.
Pence shows 14 — exceeds valid maximum of 11. Column alignment questionable. Handwriting of description is unclear. Shillings=2 is plausible but pence reading is unreliable.
Pence shows 14 — exceeds maximum. Same pattern as row 13. Column boundaries may be misaligned in this section of the page.
No amounts visible in rightmost columns. May be a sub-item or placeholder. Text is clear.
Well-defined total row with visible horizontal line. Amounts clearly separated: pounds=301, shillings=11, pence=2 with '3q' (three farthings = 0.75). All values in valid range.
Clear reading. Large pound value (40) with zero shillings and pence. Legible layout.
Clear three-part amount. Pounds=63, shillings=8, pence=4. All digits legible and values in valid range.
Horizontal rule marks this as a subtotal. Clear values: 113 pounds, 8 shillings, 4 pence. Well-aligned columns.

rows.description: pag. 1 Recepta for 8 Issues Accdt for Loughton
rows.notes: Structural header introducing a new account section. Handwriting is clear though some abbreviations ('pag.', 'Accdt') are abbreviated. No amounts.

rows.description: p. 12 Henry Asbyes Arrears Accdt for Loughton Bemish 110
rows.notes: Entry with pound amount (110) and zero shillings/pence. Description is lengthy and slightly cramped but the amount is clearly right-aligned.

rows.description: St. 2 [?] Bellt Accdt for Loughton & Bridgett
rows.notes: Pound value is 10, with zero shillings and pence. Text is somewhat unclear but amount is distinct.

rows.description: p. 27 M⁰ Bellt & recen Accdt for Loughton & Bridgett
rows.notes: Clear pound amount (175) with zero shillings/pence. Text abbreviations are standard for the period.

rows.description: St. 3 M⁰ E. C. Stanley D[?] of Bledington Benefice
rows.notes: Pound amount (100) with zero shillings/pence. Description partially abbreviated but amount is clear.
Text is heavily obscured and illegible. No amounts visible. Possibly a continuation or sub-entry.

rows.description: of M⁰ Ullards, Beer &en & the Anne
rows.notes: Pound amount (17) with zero shillings/pence. Text is somewhat unclear but amount is legible.

rows.description: Master Accdt from Mich: Apr to Mich 1732.
rows.notes: Structural header for a new account period (Master Account from Michaelmas/April to Michaelmas 1732). No amounts. Clear date notation.
Clear pound amount (265) with zero shillings/pence. Text is legible.
Abbreviated entry. Pounds=6, shillings=10. Both clearly readable and in valid range.
Subtotal line. Clear amounts: 271 pounds, 10 shillings, 0 pence. Likely the sum of rows 28 and 29.
Entry with pounds=33, shillings=3, pence=0. Handwriting is clear though the name ends with a comma.
Entry showing pounds=33, shillings=3, pence=0. Text is legible.
Amounts: 16 pounds, 7 shillings, 10 pence with three-farthings symbol (0.75). Pence=10 is valid. Fraction indicator is present.
Subtotal line. Clear values: 49 pounds, 10 shillings, 10 pence with three-farthings fraction (0.75).
Abbreviated text ('Rem:' likely 'Remainder'). Amounts: 222 pounds, 9 shillings, 0 pence. Text is somewhat unclear but amounts are legible.
Final total at bottom of page. Clear amounts: 222 pounds, 9 shillings, 0 pence. Well-aligned columns.
